examples: As Princeton Professor Alan Blinder says, "She's smart as a whip, deeply logical, willing to argue but also a good listener."
Let me be a little blinder.
Moreover, says Mr Blinder, education offers no protection.
But Blinder obviously could not be bothered to understand the proposal before launching his attack.
Dr. ALAN BLINDER (Economics, Princeton University): My guess is it will still be rather weak.
